layer: Product Default Fill Layer (Critical UX Completion Fix)

myPageRealProfile.evidence: User profile card with avatar (◈), name ('游离旅者'), level ('探索者 · 初行/逐迹/深境'), bio. 3 quick actions (edit profile, relics, rights). Journey progress bar. Recent exploration points list. Stats: relics/visits/points/journeyProgress.

relicPageCollectionSystem.evidence: Golden/bronze/shadow frame system based on resonance and tone. Frame cards with decorative corners, symbol, name, origin point, material. Rarity badges ('共鸣核心'/'回声印记'/'游离残响'). discoveredAt time. Progress bar. Placeholder frames for undiscovered state.

rightsCenterUsable.evidence: Points display card (心愿值累计). Coupon list with claim buttons (available/claimed states). rewardHistory stats. Each item has icon, description, meta, statusLabel. Progress bar for collection completion.

explorePagePopulated.evidence: 10 scenic points always visible with full list. Each point: kicker (decorative group), name, short description (preview), nav hint (location), status (completed/available). Progress summary bar. Points update on visit.

noEmptyScreens.evidence: MY page: profile card, quick actions, progress, stats, recent points. RELICS: grid with frames, progress bar, placeholder frames even for undiscovered. RIGHTS: points card, coupon list, reward history. EXPLORE: 10 points always rendered. MERCHANT: 5 coupons rendered.

v59VisualRules.evidence: Visual injector active with 21 palette colors, 8 spacing, 7 typography tokens. Color compliance enforced. All new styles use V5.9 gold/warm palette. No ad-hoc color definitions. Build validation (18/18 checks) passes.

relicPage.frameSystem: golden (共鸣核心) / bronze (回声印记) / shadow (游离残响)
relicPage.cardStructure: symbol, name, origin, material, acquisition time, rarity badge
relicPage.emptyState: placeholder frames with ? icon for undiscovered

rightsCenter.pointsCard: 心愿值累计 with progress bar

explorePage.fullPointList: 10 points with kicker, name, description, navHint, status
